description: Example geometry parameters. Confirm sign and units for your own camera/projector setup.

projector.focus_compensation: Scheimpflug hardware/manual focus; do not software-deblur
projector.keystone_compensation: Use reference phase subtraction, not projector image pre-distortion

units.p: projector pixels or equivalent phase-height period

notes: Triangulation uses h = sign * (delta_phi * p * d) / (delta_phi * p + 2*pi*l).
delta_phi must be phi_object - phi_reference from the same projector/camera geometry.
If the 30-degree projector tilt causes position-dependent stripe pitch, store d/l/p as arrays in an NPZ calibration file with keys d, l, and p.
The exact sign and denominator convention are system-dependent; use --height-sign to flip if needed.
